title.en: It didn't take long for him to find a black lake.

content.en:
After killing this Black Mist True Wolf, Ye Tian began to look for resources in the area where it was located.

It didn't take long for him to find a black lake.

On top of this black lake, some black lotus grows.

"These Black Lotus ......"

Ye Tian recognized it at a glance, these black lotuses were not simple, they were definitely good things, and they might help him improve his immeasurable will and impact the will of the Origin Realm.

So, he collected these black lotuses.

These black lotuses are rooted in this lake, and once they are taken away, the roots break.

He could see that the lotus seeds of these black lotuses had been eaten, so it was the black mist true wolf who deliberately kept these black lotuses just to eat its lotus seeds, and this kind of lotus seeds could continue to be bred.

Therefore, as long as you don't eat the black lotus, there will be a steady stream of lotus seeds.

But Ye Tian didn't have time to wait here slowly, so it was naturally a pot.

After taking these black lotuses, he sent them out and handed them over to the real body to copy the body.

Subsequently.

He took out a black lotus petal and ate it, deducing its effect.

"Sure enough, it can improve the immeasurable will, and it can also improve the understanding, and the effect is even quite good!" Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

He didn't continue to cultivate, but kept it.

These black lotuses may not be enough for him to break through, so when he collects more resources, he will then attack the will of the Origin Realm in one breath, this is the best choice!

......

Special Treasure Land Core Area.

Ye Tian's Black Abyss Giant Ape copied his body and continued to move forward, and then smashed into the territory of another creature, and after fighting with it, he also killed it.

Subsequently, he found some resources and took them all out.

In this way, he collected more high-grade special resources.

After a while.

Ye Tian finally decided to impact the will of the Origin Realm.

He took out those black lotuses and other resources, then swallowed them in one gulp, and began to refine them frantically.

Rumble!!!!

A steady stream of energy tempered his immeasurable will and improved his understanding.

Again and again it struck the shackles of will.

I don't know how long it has been.

Click!!

The bottleneck of the will in the darkness was cracked, as if the previous void world was cracked, and a higher world was seen.

A little more passed.

Boom!

The shackles of will are completely shattered.

At this time, Ye Tian's immeasurable will evolved into the will of the Origin Realm, and the quality of the will was rapidly improving, becoming more and more powerful.

After a long time.

The metamorphosis of the will is over.

Then.

One wisp of his will is equivalent to dozens of wills in the past, this is the evolution and sublimation of will!

"The will of the Origin Realm is indeed much stronger than the previous immeasurable will!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

And with the will being raised to the will of the Origin Realm, the strength he can exert is naturally even more terrifying.

He tried, and he was able to burst out the golden body on the other side and the magic power on the other side into even more terrifying power.

Subsequently.

He continued to refine the remaining resources, and there were still some effects, but the effect was not too obvious, and a large number of resources were needed to have a significant improvement, and that was enough!

In the years that followed, he continued to collect the resources in the treasure land, and tried to buy all the resources inside.

When the time comes, he will reveal the situation to Gu Hengshan again.

Before you know it, the long years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Black Abyss Giant Ape Replica Body had reached the core area of this treasure land, and many creatures were either killed by him or driven away by him.

Moreover, a lot of resources have been scraped away by him, maybe there are leaking resources, but definitely not many.

After all, he relied on the long years, slowly looking for a scrape, and there was very little nature that was missed.

Rumble!!!!

After fighting with a creature in the most core area for a long time, Ye Tian finally killed it, and found a lot of resources here.

Here, he found a fragment of the Origin.

"I didn't expect there to be an Origin Fragment here!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

Thereupon.

It was here that he began to comprehend the rules of the Origin.

What he actually wants to comprehend is the Origin Rule of the other side, but it is also very difficult to really comprehend it.

However, with such an origin fragment, even if you can't understand the origin rules of the other side, it is very good to improve the ordinary origin rules!

In the years that followed, he was here to participate in enlightenment and cultivation.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Before you know it, tens of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Click!

This piece of origin fragment was also consumed by him and turned into powder.

"I still haven't comprehended the origin rules of the other side, but I have comprehended a lot of ordinary origin rules, and the realm has improved!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

I don't know how much more I have improved this time than the last time, maybe my understanding has improved a lot, which has led to a much better effect of enlightenment.

......

Guheng Mountain.

Ye Tian came to find the Lord of Eternal Zero.

When the Lord of Eternal Zero saw Ye Tian, his face was immediately shocked, he actually sensed the faint Origin Realm will aura from Ye Tian's body.

Although Ye Tian was trying his best to cover it up, he definitely didn't make a mistake.

"Endless Lord, your will has reached the Origin Realm Will Realm?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero asked in shock.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"How did you do that?" asked the Lord of Eternal Zero, confused.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian talked about the situation of that special treasure land, saying that he had found some resources, improved his immeasurable will and understanding, and then broke through!

"What, that treasure land still has such a precious resource?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero was shocked.

"These are some of the resources I found!"

He took out some peripheral resources, which were not very many, but they were enough.

The Lord of Eternal Zero used a material and sensed it.

"It's true that it can improve my will, but it's not very useful to me!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero.

Then, he followed Ye Tian to see the treasure land, and he wanted to go over and have a look.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered this treasure land with the Lord of Eternal Zero.

Rumble!!!!!

As soon as the Lord of Eternal Zero entered this treasure land, his immeasurable will was completely sealed, making his face change.

This treasure land was even able to seal his Origin Realm Will!!!!

Although he knew the rules of this treasure land from Ye Tian's mouth, he didn't expect that his Origin Realm will could be sealed, and he couldn't compete with it at all.

With the immeasurable will of the Origin Realm being sealed, his physical body became extremely heavy and extremely difficult to control, and the strength he exerted was naturally extremely weak.

Subsequently.

He went deep into the treasure and went to investigate.

Soon, he encountered a black abyss giant ape.

As a result, something embarrassing happened!
